programme.title: Psychic Witness

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: A California man finds his elderly neighbors murdered in their own home. In Ohio, police investigate a bloody attack but cannot find the victim. A pair of psychics join in to help.

programme.title: Psychic Witness

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play

programme.title: Cold Blood: Murder in Modesto

programme.title: Cold Blood: Sheltered From The Truth

programme.title: The New Detectives: Wasted Youth

programme.title: The New Detectives: Signed In Blood

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth.

programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When a retired pro-wrestler is brutally murdered in the Manitoba hamlet of Inwood, police coordinate a massive sting operation that brings to light a savage small-town conspiracy.

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: When a bomb kills a young paraplegic mother, authorities must determine if it was sent by a drug dealer seeking revenge or someone much closer to the victim

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: Keith Black, a taekwondo instructor, disappears without a trace in West Kelowna, a quaint community in British Columbia. His family notifies the authorities. However, investigations into the disappearance slow down due to a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos
programme.desc: The ‘Black Widower’ Malcolm Webster was a serial seducer who married three different women. The episode focuses on wife Claire, who Webster murdered in 1994, drugging and setting fire to the car she was in to fake a fatal car crash.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos: My Boyfriend Murdered My Sister And Best Friend And Made Me Watch
programme.desc: In February 2012, 19-year-old Elisa Frank was forced to watch helplessly as her former lover, Ahmad Otak, ferociously stabbed both her sister Kim and best friend Samantha, before bundling Elisa into a car and driving to Dover.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghosts of Greenwich

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live To Tell: River's Edge
programme.desc: On January 8, 2000, college students Danielle Keener and Dan Zapp were on a date, walking along a river’s edge outside York, Pennsylvania, when they were kidnapped at gunpoint by a man in a pick-up truck.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: A report on the 26-year effort of Bruce Lisker to overturn his conviction for the murder of his mother. In March 1983, 17-year-old Bruce Lisker called 911 to tell police that he had found his mother, Dorka Lisker, beaten severely and stabbed in her home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Body of Lies

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil’s Work (Part 1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Incarnate

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1998, Peter Bergna's car crashes off a mountain, killing his wife Rinette. After suspicions arise and a first trial ends in a hung jury, Bergna is convicted of murder in 2002 following new testimony about his abusive behavior.

programme.title: Arthur: I Wanna Hold Your Hand/Whistling in the Wind

programme.title: Arthur: The Boy With His Head In The Clouds/More!
programme.desc: All the kids know that George is smart--so why does he sometimes have trouble reading and writing? Then, D.W. is thrilled to be getting an allowance. At last, she'll be rich and powerful!

programme.title: Arthur: Fright Night/Citizen Cheikh

programme.title: Arthur: April 9th
programme.desc: April 9th is a normal day until a fire destroys the teacher's lounge and forces Lakewood Elementary to close. This unexpected event finds creates a wide range of emotional reactions, for Arthur, his friends and teachers, and the community.

programme.title: Arthur: Do You Speak George?/World Girls
programme.desc: Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.title: Arthur: The Friend Who Wasn't There/Surprise!
programme.desc: Muffy embarks on a quest to find her long lost imaginary friend. And then it's Catherine's 16th birthday, and Francine has been cordially UN-invited to the party.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Library Card/Arthur's Big Hit
programme.desc: When D.W. discovers that she can get her own library card, she rejoices at the world of books waiting for her. And, is it ever okay to hit someone? Sometimes you just get so mad, you wanna....pow! Right??

programme.title: Arthur: Ants in Arthur's Pants/Don't Ask Muffy
programme.desc: To excel in science, the class has to prove that they have P.A.N.T.S.--the ability to be patient, attentive, nosy, thoughtful, and systematic. And Muffy starts an advice column to launch her career as a rich and famous talk-show host.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Revenge of the Fly
programme.desc: When Baxter Stockman, AKA the Fly, gets his pincers on some of Krang and Shredder's mutagen, he uses it to start turning everyone in the city into giant hideous mutant insects!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Atlantis Awakes
programme.desc: The Turtles join forces with Merdude, a strange fish-creature, and journey with him to the fabulous underwater city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dirk Savage: Mutant Hunter
programme.desc: When eccentric zillionaire A.J. Howard hires Dirk Savage, a professional mercenary, to rid the city of its 'mutant problem', the first mutants he goes after are the Turtles!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Krangazoids
programme.desc: It's trouble for the Turtles when Krang makes five clones of himself and sends them up to do his bidding in the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Combat Land
programme.desc: The Turtles are invited to be the first guests at combat Land, an amusement park where visitors fight a wide variety of robotic warriors from various historical eras.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder Triumphant!
programme.desc: The Turtles face their greatest challenge ever when they become trapped in Dimension X--while Shredder and Krang bring the Technodrome out of the ocean depths and at last conquer the city!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Get Shredder!
programme.desc: Shredder & Krang are still loose on Earth, but without the resources of the Technodrome, they plan to steal equipment from the abandoned Hall of Science at the World Fair.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Wrath of the Rat King
programme.desc: Burne has created a hot line for callers to use should they spot those responsible for the destruction of the Channel Six News Building. Inside the Hall of Science, Shredder is fearful that the Turtles will eventually find a way into the building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cyber-Turtles
programme.desc: While investigating the theft of a rare telescope, the Astro-Viewer, the Turtles discover odd tracks leading away from the National Space Exploration Centre.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): State of Shock
programme.desc: After defeating a mysterious group of ninjas at the Emeryville Power Station, the Turtles decode part of a map that they were able to liberate from the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Dead Man Walking

programme.title: A Haunted House

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine 2

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A blaxploitation film about a woman whose drug-dealing brother ratted on her undercover narcotics-agent boyfriend to the mob and she, in turn, poses as a call girl to infiltrate the mobsters who butchered him.

programme.title: Candy Stripe Nurses
programme.desc: Marisa, Dianne and Sandy are three sexy teenagers who work as candy stripers at a local hospital.

programme.title: Queen of the Blues
programme.desc: Mary Millington is Queen of the Blues - Mayfair's most famous stripper. She must use her pleasing assets to defuse the ongoing criminal activity, surrounding the nightclub she performs in.

programme.title: Satan's Cheerleaders
programme.desc: The janitor at a local high school is actually the scout for a coven of Satanists on the lookout for a virgin to sacrifice. One day he kidnaps the cheerleading squad to use for their rituals. However, one of the cheerleaders is actually a witch.

programme.title: Today We Kill, Tomorrow We Die!

programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two hapless soldiers of misfortune (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) meet a beautiful girl (Melody Anderson) with a map to a lost gold mine and decide to have one last shot at striking it rich. But the trail to the treasure is no yellow brick road!

programme.title: Criminal Law
programme.desc: Attorney Oldman successfully defends accused killer Kevin Bacon. It is only after proving his client's innocence by discrediting eyewitness, that Oldman discovers Bacon is guilty--and intends to kill again.

programme.title: JFK

A family man struggling to hold it all together discovers a hidden parlor that offers a solution...sexbots.

programme.title: Amanda and the Alien

programme.title: Saving Winston

programme.desc: A girl seeks help and guidance from a robot monster to cope with the bullies at school and her father's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Drug Wars: The New Drug Stores
programme.desc: Guatemalan drug gangs are taking over small businesses, using local hotels and restaurants as fronts for selling drugs. Law enforcement attempts a crackdown, with hundreds of police officers executing big raids on these small-time dealers.

programme.desc: Guatemalan drug gangs are taking over small businesses, using local hotels and restaurants as fronts for selling drugs. Law enforcement attempts a crackdown, with hundreds of police officers executing big raids on these small-time dealers.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Carry a Big Stick

programme.title: Drug Wars: Quezon City Slum

programme.title: Drug Wars: Buy Busts
programme.desc: The Philippine police are getting creative with their anti-narcotics operations. They’re increasingly turning to “Buy Busts”, a new tactic where they lure dealers and traffickers moving large amounts of product across the country.

programme.title: Drug Wars: No Vacancy
programme.desc: In the Philippines, President Duterte’s all-out war on drugs is rapidly filling up the country’s jails with both dealers and users. Adding to the violence, mercenaries and vigilantes are taking the law into their own hands

programme.title: Drug Wars: The New Drug Stores
programme.desc: Guatemalan drug gangs are taking over small businesses, using local hotels and restaurants as fronts for selling drugs. Law enforcement attempts a crackdown, with hundreds of police officers executing big raids on these small-time dealers.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a washed-up boxer who is found floating in a pool.

programme.desc: The disappearance of a casino employee leads the police to uncover a UFO cult.

programme.desc: The CSIs are immersed in the theatrical mystery of the Cirque du Soleil.

programme.title: Scorpion: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion: Plight At The Museum
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Scorpion: Bat Poop Crazy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: The Expendables 3
programme.desc: After a former associate makes it his mission to end the Expendables, Barney Ross (Sylvester Stallone) assembles a team of younger, tech-savvy recruits to help take down their enemy.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: War veteran John Rambo tries to find some semblance of peace by raising horses on a ranch in Arizona. But when a vicious Mexican cartel kidnaps a teenage girl, Rambo embarks on a bloody and personal quest to rescue her and punish those responsible.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: An expert (Sylvester Stallone) in prison security joins forces with an inmate (Arnold Schwarzenegger) to break out of a top-secret, high-tech facility.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit

programme.title: True Justice

programme.title: True Justice

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Khali becomes personally involved in the case of Mina Diwan, a strong-willed Indian 18yr old who arrives in Canada looking for her “runaway groom”. Using a false identity, Anwar Singh has married Mina in the Punjab and stolen her family’s $50,000.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: ICS must save Maggie’s daughter from a cross-border serial killer.

programme.desc: Attempting to deliver serum to a plague-stricken planet, a pilot (Eric McCormack) and his crew crash land on an unknown moon. Bitten by an alien spider while fixing the ship, the pilot's mind wanders between alternate realities…in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A remorseless, uncaring scientist (Stephen Lang) and his partner (Michael Ontkean) discover a way to bring life back to the recently deceased. But after the scientist is killed and brought back to life himself, will he choose to live differently?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: Cold Blood: Sheltered From The Truth

programme.title: Cold Blood: Shattered Dreams

programme.desc: Two fierce opponents best Ton and Allen at the auction, leaving the duo in the lurch with a "trash unit" and little chance of breaking even for the day. And Ton gets tazed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Day of the Dog

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Time to Cry
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow Dog turns to the fugitive's on-again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof

programme.desc: It's a great honor to be asked to represent an Indian tribe in the Mesa Verde Memorial, but Brad Turner doesn't appear excited when Calhoun Burns tells him they've been invited by Nevada Smith's tribe.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold are caught up in lightning storm that causes Penfold to spill the test tube's contents and transports them to the future where the world is ruled by cats who are taking orders from Big Leo.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Black & White & Pink All Over:' Detective Pinky agrees to locate a pesky little girl's doll. 'Beach Blanket Pinky': The Panther must rally the regulars at his favorite beach to defeat the Dogfather and company who have marked the beach as theirs.

programme.title: Count Duckula: O.O. Duck
programme.desc: The Egg decides to steal Castle Duckula to take over the world.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Mississippi Duck
programme.desc: Count Duckula and his servants travel onto a steamboat in the River Mississippi.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Matt discovers an empty submarine controlled by Brian the Brain, a computer he had given grant money for, and now in the clutches of Mayhem and the VENOM gang.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted's adventures take them to the North Pole with Admiral Byrd, ancient Egypt, and King Tut, and finally to Dr. Livingston in the African jungles as they search for a rare exotic bird.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Cinderpink': Servant Panther rises to noble rank when he exposes the Dogfather as a thief. 'It's A Bird, It's A Pain, It's Superfan!': Panther is convinced his favorite football team cannot win the Ultrabowl if he's not in attendance.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Dear Diary
programme.desc: Duckula and Goosewing discover their grandfathers' diaries, and history is sure to repeat itself!

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit houses in Derby, Kent and Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a barn in Kent, a Victorian mansion Lancashire and an old chapel in Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 2
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a Cornish bungalow, a semi detached house in Southampton and a terraced property in Wales.

programme.title: Arthur: Ants in Arthur's Pants/Don't Ask Muffy
programme.desc: To excel in science, the class has to prove that they have P.A.N.T.S.--the ability to be patient, attentive, nosy, thoughtful, and systematic. And Muffy starts an advice column to launch her career as a rich and famous talk-show host.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success
programme.desc: Arthur's beloved piano teacher is retiring, but she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding--and famous, too! When Buster signs up to sell candy for the band, he figures it's easy money -- who doesn't love chocolate?

programme.title: Arthur: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales
programme.desc: The gang is devastated after their tree house collapses. Can architect Frank Gehry help them to rebuild? Everyone in Arthur's chorus group is excited about their upcoming performance in Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: There is a virus spreading through Lakewood Elementary--it’s new nicknames and it’s changing how everyone treats each other! The playground has been quiet lately--too quiet--and the Tough Customers don't like it one bit.

programme.title: Arthur: My Dad, The Garbage Man/Poor Muffy
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn's class is taking a field trips to visit parents at their jobs. Francine's not sure she wants the class to know her dad is a garbage man. And a new carpet and a sneezing attack means Muffy must spend the weekend at Francine's.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. saves everything. But her most prized possession is a snowball from last winter. But now it’s disappeared! Then, Arthur, Francine, and Buster must do a report on ancient Rome--but can they work as a team to complete the assignment?

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Tough Customer/Brain's Chess Mess
programme.desc: The Tough Customers realize it's time to quit bullying and set out to find a new hobby--but can Molly ever truly change her ways? And Brain starts a chess club at school to improve his game and beat Los Dedos, the local chess master.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Baby/D.W.'s Baby
programme.desc: Arthur is not too sure he's ready for a new baby in the house. What do babies do besides cry? Then, living with a baby is no picnic. Just how long will Baby Kate be hanging around, anyway? And who would even miss D.W. if she ran away?

programme.title: Arthur: The Hallway Minotaur/Ladonna's Like List
programme.desc: Attention Lakewood Elementary! There's a new sheriff—er--hallway monitor-in town, and his name is George Lundgren. Ladonna Compson is friendly, funny, and full of personality. Everyone likes her! At least, that's what she thought.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bunches of Boxes!
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes a turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park!/BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find the loudest sound in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): State of Shock
programme.desc: After defeating a mysterious group of ninjas at the Emeryville Power Station, the Turtles decode part of a map that they were able to liberate from the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cry H.A.V.O.C.!
programme.desc: The Turtles get the drop on masked thieves hijacking a jewellery store, only to have themselves arrested for the crime! Before the turtles can be booked, they are rescued by the mutants Amok and Overdrive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): H.A.V.O.C. in the Streets!
programme.desc: Titanus sends of couple of his H.A.V.O.C.mutants to bust into the aerospace plant and steal some much needed equipment. Only problem is that the Turtles were waiting for them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Krakus
programme.desc: Krakus, a cop from the future, arrives and thinking that the Turtles are in league with Titanus, shakes them down for information.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Trek
programme.desc: Krang activates his new dimensional portal, thanks to Shredder's installation of the Energy Transmitter at the Power Relay Station, giving him access to Dimension X.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Unknown Ninja
programme.desc: While watching video tapes of old battles, Raphael sees a mystery person spying on them. While the Turtles investigate, an alien warlord named Dregg sends his TechnoGansters to steal all the gold on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dregg of the Earth
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to let them know that Dregg has landed on Earth and is preparing a press conference. The Turtles rush to meet April at the Park, where they hear Dregg announce his intentions and offers the world his molecular converter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Wrath of Medusa
programme.desc: Believing that the Turtles are the only thing that stands between him and total domination of the planet, Dregg makes contact with Medusa, a sinisterly beautiful alien.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Showdown
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to inform them that all the TV stations in the City are jammed. Sleazebug tries to recruit the Turtles for a martial arts tournament.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second
programme.desc: Carter, April and the Turtles investigate a break-in at the Antique Timepiece Museum. Convinced that Dregg is responsible, the Turtles discover a clue on a wall display.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: By chance, Grizzly discovers that the ranger's new robot vacuum cleaner also gives very pleasant back massages.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: To make sure that the Lemmings don't snatch his chocolate spread, Grizzy turns the fridge into a safe. However, the Lemmings see Grizzy open the door while sleepwalking.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have invented a new popcorn game which consists of throwing popcorn and catching it with their mouths.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
